layers.name: background_paper
layers.description: The base layer of the artwork, depicting a textured, off-white traditional Chinese rice paper canvas, providing a neutral backdrop for the landscape.
layers.regeneration_prompt: A textured, off-white traditional Chinese rice paper canvas, full frame, empty, clean, high resolution, in the style of traditional Chinese ink wash painting.

layers.name: distant_mountains
layers.description: Majestic, dark, ink-wash mountains in the far background, rendered with varying shades of grey and black, suggesting rugged peaks and valleys, partially obscured by atmospheric effects.
layers.regeneration_prompt: Ink wash painting of majestic, rugged mountains in the far background, rendered in shades of grey and black, traditional Chinese landscape style, on a transparent background.

layers.name: midground_landscape
layers.description: A winding river with waterfalls flowing through a valley, flanked by green-tinted hills with smaller trees and a narrow path, rendered in traditional Chinese ink wash style.
layers.regeneration_prompt: Ink wash painting of a winding river with waterfalls, flowing through a valley flanked by green-tinted hills with smaller trees and a narrow path, traditional Chinese landscape style, on a transparent background.

layers.name: central_pavilion_and_pine_trees
layers.description: A small, traditional Chinese pavilion nestled on a prominent hill, surrounded by large, gnarled pine trees with dark green needles, rendered in detailed ink wash, serving as a focal point.
layers.regeneration_prompt: Ink wash painting of a small, traditional Chinese pavilion on a prominent hill, surrounded by large, gnarled pine trees with dark green needles, detailed, traditional Chinese landscape style, on a transparent background.

layers.name: mist_and_clouds
layers.description: Soft, ethereal white and light grey mist and clouds, semi-transparent, partially obscuring the mountains and creating a sense of depth and atmosphere in the landscape.
layers.regeneration_prompt: Soft, ethereal white and light grey mist and clouds, atmospheric effect, semi-transparent, traditional Chinese ink wash style, on a transparent background.

layers.name: calligraphy_and_seals
layers.description: Black Chinese calligraphy characters and two vibrant red square seals, positioned vertically in the upper right corner, adding an artistic signature and cultural detail.
layers.regeneration_prompt: Black Chinese calligraphy characters and two red square seals, vertically aligned in the upper right corner, traditional Chinese ink wash style, on a transparent background.
